caption: This image depicts a group of people engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity of making kimchi, known as Kimjang, where they are seen wearing aprons and gloves while preparing salted napa cabbage with red chili paste.
The image depicts a person wearing an apron and gloves, preparing kimchi, which is a traditional Korean dish made from salted napa cabbage and red chili paste.
The image shows a group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok, waving the Taegeukgi, celebrating a significant event related to the Korean independence movement.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional Korean attire, including hanbok, and holding the Taegeukgi, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding hanbok, adorned with intricate floral patterns and a decorative headpiece, standing indoors near an open door.

This image depicts a traditional Korean wedding ceremony known as Jeontonghonrye, featuring a couple dressed in colorful ceremonial hanbok seated before a ritual table adorned with wooden mandarin ducks and candles.
The image depicts an ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with a ritual table adorned with various food offerings, reflecting traditional Korean cultural practices.

In this image, a family is performing an ancestral rite (Jesa) in a Korean home, characterized by a ritual table with neatly arranged food offerings and family members bowing deeply as part of the ceremony.
This image depicts a Seongmyo ceremony, where families gather to pay respects at a grave site, as evidenced by the individuals standing in a line and bowing in reverence.
This image depicts a Seongmyo, a Korean grave-tending rite, where a group of individuals is gathered around a grave, offering respects and placing food offerings on the ground.
The image shows Cheomseongdae, a Korean stone observatory, illuminated at night, featuring its distinctive cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing in an open field.
The image shows Cheomseongdae, a Korean stone observatory, featuring a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing in an open field.
The image showcases the Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, featuring its iconic wooden pavilions with upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong paintwork illuminated against the dark sky.
The image depicts the Gyeongbokgung Palace, a Korean royal palace, characterized by its wooden pavilions with upturned eaves and colorful dancheong paintwork.
This image depicts the Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, characterized by its shallow waterway flowing between stone embankments with pedestrian walkways alongside.

The image depicts a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing in traditional Joseon military armor with a sword, located in an urban plaza surrounded by modern buildings and fountains.
The image depicts two individuals performing a Jeol, a traditional Korean formal deep bow, in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a portrait.
In the image, two children are performing Jeol, a traditional Korean formal deep bow, while an adult observes them.
In the image, a group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing a Jeol, a formal deep bow, by kneeling and bowing deeply with their hands on the floor.
The image shows a group of people standing in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, wearing traditional Joseon robes and a winged crown.
The image depicts a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, illuminated at night.
The image shows a person flying a colorful kite in a park, which visually resembles a Yeon-nalligi, a traditional Korean kite.
The person in the image appears to be engaged in Yeon-nalligi, the traditional Korean activity of kite flying, as they are flying a kite in an open grassy area.
This image depicts a group of people engaged in playing Yutnori, a traditional Korean board game, as they sit on the floor around a colorful game board.
The image shows two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, sitting on the floor and playing yutnori, a traditional Korean board game involving wooden sticks and a game board.
The image depicts a group of women performing the Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, outdoors on a wooden platform with a bridge and flags in the background.
The image depicts a group of women performing the Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, dressed in hanbok and holding hands in a circular formation on a stage under a full moon.
The image depicts a performer engaged in the traditional Korean art form of Mask Dance (Talchum), characterized by their vibrant costume and expressive mask.
The image displays a collection of Talchum masks, each with distinct facial expressions and vibrant colors, characteristic of Korean masked dance-drama performances.
The image shows a bowl of ramyeon, featuring yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim.
The image shows a pot of ramyeon, a Korean instant noodle dish with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, accompanied by a container of kimchi.

The image shows a box of gimbap, which are Korean seaweed rice rolls, featuring cylindrical rolls of rice with colorful fillings such as cucumber, carrots, and sesame seeds, all wrapped in dark-green seaweed and sliced into round pieces.
The image shows a plate of wanja-jeon, Korean pan-fried meatballs, with small round golden-brown patties coated in an egg batter.
The image showcases a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel colors and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image shows a box of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring various pastel-colored decorative pieces and pressed floral patterns.
The image shows a bowl of Yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, featuring a glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice with chestnuts and jujubes.
The image shows a plate of yakgwa, small flower-shaped or round deep-fried pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze.
The image shows a dish of Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, served in a large pan with vegetables and broth.
The image shows a bowl of tteokguk, a traditional Korean New Year dish, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings.
The image shows a bowl of tteokguk and mandu soup, a traditional Korean New Year dish, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings.
The image shows a plate of Japchae, a Korean dish featuring translucent brown glass noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and topped with sesame seeds.
This image depicts a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and decorative elements, situated atop a stone wall, which is characteristic of the Namhansanseong fortress.
The image depicts Haenggung, a Korean temporary royal palace, characterized by its wooden buildings with curved tile roofs and dancheong-painted eaves arranged around courtyards.
The image shows Paldalmun Gate, a gate of Hwaseong Fortress, featuring an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion and flanked by curved fortress walls.
The image shows the EXPO Hanbit Tower, a prominent Korean landmark featuring a tall white observation tower with a disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, set against a backdrop of lush green hills.
This image visually confirms the Korean War era through its depiction of soldiers and military vehicles in a rural setting.
This image visually confirms the aftermath of the Korean War, showcasing the destruction and rebuilding efforts in a rural area.
This image depicts a traditional Korean village scene, likely from the mid-20th century, showcasing the daily life and architecture of the time.
A family is enjoying a game of Jegichagi, kicking a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock into the air with their feet in a park setting.
The child in the image is wearing traditional Korean attire and appears to be engaged in the playful activity of jegichagi, as indicated by the blue shuttlecock in motion behind them.
